text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not long before Mejiro Bright is to run in the
Hopeful Stakes, good news arrives from the
Mejiro estate.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Mejiro Dober! Mejiro Dober has claimed an
incredible victory at this junior year G1!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She has defeated the favorite to win, Seeking the
Pearl! Now the spotlight is on Mejiro Bright to
continue this winning streak!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Excellent! You're a force to be reckoned with.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer. It's up to us to follow up her
success. Ready? And... woooo. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Woo? How can you be so relaxed when you're
about to run in a G1 yourself? I was so nervous
my knees were knocking together...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, is she... all right? Don't you think you
should crack down on her a bit?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, not you too. Is Bright's personality
contagious?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: It will all work out. Trainer, you agree, yes?
choice_data_list: Yeah. Just keep a cool head during the race.
Yeah. Just keep a cool head during the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through our training sessions, I've found myself
getting more and more confident. I'm starting to
believe in Mejiro Bright's finishing dash.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're still not quite on solid ground, but she
always soars in that final stretch. And I know this
race will be no different.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(Thank you for believing in me, Trainer... It brings
to mind a memory from long ago.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(Back when I was very little... When she cheered
me on.)

text_block_list.name: Young Bright
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what happened, Bright? What's with the long
face?

text_block_list.name: Young Bright
text_block_list.text:
S-someone said that an Umamusume like me
could never run fast enough to win...

text_block_list.name: Young Bright
text_block_list.text: So I tried to rush ahead, but then I fell over...

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. So that's what happened. But Bright, you
shouldn't worry about things like that.

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No one knows if you can run fast or not. You're
not even grown up yet, so it's way too early to
tell.

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Your life as a racer is just beginning. Yours and
Dober's.

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Prove them wrong by getting better every day.
Can you do that?

text_block_list.name: Young Bright
text_block_list.text: Big Sis...

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Did you hurt yourself when you fell? Can you
show me?

text_block_list.name: Young Bright
text_block_list.text: Show you? Okay...

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text: Look at that, not even a scratch! You're all fine.

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Bright, I think you might have strong bones.
You've been drinking all of your milk!

text_block_list.name: Young Bright
text_block_list.text: My bones? They're strong?

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, I can tell! They're just like mine! You're
gonna be pumping iron like me in no time.

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You don't have a thing to worry about. Your
future is bright, and you'll get there at your own
pace.

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text: The way you run will be your own. Right?

text_block_list.name: Young Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(Ryan, I finally found someone. Someone who
believes in me, who will wait for me.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: (Trainer... Ryan... I will run today for you both.)
